channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: AFP Provides Support for Civilian Mission Delivering Supplies to Pag-asa Island
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) announced it will assist a civilian-led initiative, the Atin Ito Coalition, to ensure safe passage for their fourth mission, 'Balik Pag-asa,' to Pag-asa Islan...

item.title: Supreme Court Overturns Duterte Admin’s Dismissal of Carandang from Ombudsman Post
item.description: The Supreme Court has reversed the decision of the Duterte administration to dismiss Melchor Arthur Carandang as Deputy Ombudsman. Carandang was dismissed in 2018 after investigating former President ...

item.title: Simba Wins Union Cup After Intense Midfield Battle Against Young Africans
item.description: The 2026 Union Cup final in Dar es Salaam between Simba SC and Young Africans SC was intense and physical, with the midfield dominating the game from start to finish. Simba SC had relied on a patient ...

item.title: Uber Plans to Equip Drivers’ Cars with Sensors to Support Autonomous Vehicle Data Collection
item.description: Uber is exploring a strategic shift beyond ride-hailing by aiming to transform its vast driver network into a large-scale data collection platform for autonomous vehicle (AV) companies. The company’s ...

item.title: Audible Launches Audio-Only Pop-Up Bookstore Concept in New York
item.description: Audible, wey be Amazon subsidiary and major player for audiobook market, don open one unique pop-up store for New York wey dem dey call “bookless bookstore.” This new concept shop, located for Lower E...

item.title: Small Business Owners Question the Value of Hard Work Amid Rising Taxes and Economic Pressures
item.description: Many small business owners in the UK are increasingly questioning whether the effort they put into their work is worthwhile, given the current economic and tax environment. According to Maggie Pagano,...

item.title: Banky W Shares How Adesua Made the First Move in Their Marriage
item.description: For plenty people wey dey follow celebrity gist, e fit surprise dem say na Adesua Etomi-Wellington be the person wey first make move for her relationship with Banky W. The singer, actor, and politicia...

item.title: Trump endorses Rep. Andy Barr in Kentucky Senate race
item.description: Former President Donald Trump has intervened in Kentucky’s Republican Senate primary by endorsing Rep. Andy Barr, a move that could strongly influence the race to replace retiring Sen. Mitch McConnell...

item.title: McKenna Family Pledges $20-Million in Scholarships to St. Francis Xavier University
item.description: Frank McKenna, former premier of New Brunswick and Canadian ambassador to the United States, and his family are donating $20 million in scholarships to St. Francis Xavier University (StFX) in Antigoni...

item.title: Gordie Howe International Bridge opening delayed as Canada and U.S. continue negotiations over costs and terms
item.description: The opening of the Gordie Howe International Bridge, a major infrastructure project connecting Windsor, Ontario, and Detroit, Michigan, remains on hold as Canadian and American officials work toward f...

item.title: Alex Zanardi, Renowned F1 Driver and Paralympic Gold Medalist, Passes Away at 59
item.description: Alex Zanardi, the celebrated Italian racing driver and Paralympic athlete, has passed away at the age of 59. Zanardi, originally from Bologna, made his Formula One debut in 1991 and later achieved sig...

item.title: Vietnam maintains firm maritime resistance against China while expanding land-based trade ties
item.description: Vietnam continues to carefully balance its complex relationship with China by firmly resisting Beijing's actions in the South China Sea while strengthening economic and political cooperation on land. ...

item.title: Atwoli Urges IEBC to Control Early Political Rallies and Protect Workers
item.description: During the 61st Labour Day celebrations in Vihiga County, COTU Secretary General Francis Atwoli issued a strong call to the Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) to clamp down on prem...

item.title: US Issues Sanctions Warning to Shipping Companies Paying Tolls to Iran in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The United States has issued a fresh warning to international shipping companies, stating that they could face sanctions if they make payments to Iran for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz. Th...

item.title: Granville Street SRO set for closure as residents relocate to improved housing
item.description: The Luugat single-room occupancy (SRO) building on Vancouver’s Granville Street, purchased by the province for $55 million and converted to supportive housing during the COVID-19 pandemic, is set to c...

item.title: Uasin Gishu Couple Receives Car Gift from Children in Australia During Thanksgiving
item.description: Ishmael Kiptoo and his wife Judith Kiptoo from Maji Mingi in Uswo, Uasin Gishu County were overjoyed after their children living in Australia surprised them with a brand new car. The gift came during ...

item.title: Trump Advocates Cognitive Testing for Presidential Candidates
item.description: On May 1, 2026, former President Donald Trump addressed residents of The Villages, a large retirement community in Florida, emphasizing his belief that candidates for president and vice president shou...

item.title: Pakistan inflation rises to nearly 11% in April amid surge in energy and transport costs
item.description: Pakistan’s inflation has once again entered double digits after 21 months, reaching close to 11% year-on-year in April, according to official data. This increase has mainly been driven by sharp rises ...

item.title: Government Acknowledges the Role of Workers on Workers' Day 2026
item.description: On 1 May 2026, South Africa observed Workers' Day, a public holiday dedicated to honouring the contributions of workers across all sectors. The Acting Director-General of the Government Communication ...

item.title: 19-year-old arrested after Peter Kay Birmingham show evacuated over suspicious bag
item.description: A 19-year-old man has been arrested on suspicion of a bomb hoax offence following the evacuation of a Peter Kay performance at Birmingham's Utilita Arena. The incident occurred on Friday night during ...
